# Fixture provenance

`codex-success.json` and `antigravity-cli-success.json` were captured on Linux Mint 22.3
with CodexBar 0.43.0 on 2026-07-15. Account identifiers, email addresses, organization names,
home-directory paths, credentials, tokens, cookies, UUIDs, and unique credit identifiers were
removed or replaced before these files were added to the repository.

Files whose names contain `synthetic` are constructed compatibility and failure scenarios. They
do not claim to be output captured from a live provider.
